metadata.description: Ontario Public Health Units - Combined data from ontario.ca and PHU Locator
notes: Some ontario.ca PHUs map to multiple locator sub-offices (e.g. Lakelands = Formerly Haliburton + Formerly Peterborough)
Nigigoonsiminikaaning First Nation manually mapped to Northwestern Health Unit
Iskatewizaagegan #39 Independent First Nation mapped to Northwestern Health Unit (Shoal Lake area, NW Ontario)
